Name: Soukaku's Namecard
Desc: Obtained by unlocking Soukaku's Mindscape Cinema "Attendance Meal Allowance"
Desc2:
A card with the images of the six Anti-Entropy members on it.
It's very memorable, but it's not clear whether it can be used as a name card. Even if you contact Soukaku, the team's "guardian" will filter out the commissions you're applying for.
